***Output instructions:***
- Output exactly one label word (e.g. positive, negative, neutral).
- Do not include punctuation, explanations, or extra words.

***Output instructions:***
- Respond with a single word: the class label.
- Valid labels depend on the dataset (e.g. positive / negative / neutral).
- Any additional text will cause a parse error.

***Output format:***
Your entire response must be one label token.
No explanation. No punctuation. Just the label.
